# coherence-design-system (read-only mirror)

Automatically mirrored from [`peak-mind-llc/coherence-workstation`](https://github.com/peak-mind-llc/coherence-workstation) (`packages/cw-design-system-ts`) by the `mirror-public-packages` workflow (SPEC-033).

**Do not edit here — changes are overwritten on the next mirror.** The source of truth and all pull requests live in the workstation monorepo.

Consume via a pinned tag:

```bash
npm install github:peak-mind-llc/coherence-design-system#v<version>
```
